link_prediction_RECONSTRUCTION.TASK_TYPE: RECONSTRUCTION — held-out edges predicted from the SAME co-voting signal that DEFINES them; NOT general hidden-edge prediction. See temporal_link_prediction for real future-edge prediction.

temporal_link_prediction_PREDICTION.task: predict S117 high-agreement edges from S116 (temporal, no leakage)

synthetic_edge_calibration.note: validates log-odds edge-engine calibration under a fully-modeled observation process; present-only typed edge models add a documented absence/exposure approximation

structural_finding: the S117 co-voting graph's structural posterior prefers 'four_faction' over one_bloc: the Senate has real INTRA-party sub-factions, so a 4-faction model out-fits a flat 2-party model even under BIC (2-party recovery is still 0.98 at K=2). Detecting >2 blocs is a correct finding, not a failure.
